model.description: Primary analysis model in provider/model format (e.g. anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5)

fallbackModel.description: Fallback model used when the primary model is rate-limited (429).

transport.description: Optional transport used to send requests. Use this when the model name represents the routed provider/model but the HTTP transport should be a gateway such as Vercel AI Gateway.

apiBaseUrl.description: Optional OpenAI-compatible base URL for custom gateways or proxies.

exclude.description: Additional paths/patterns to exclude from analysis
